howItWorks.intro: This 3d print bed adhesion calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Bed Temp

faq.a: Uneven cooling causes corners to curl up. Higher bed temps and enclosures help.
Extra first-layer rings around the part to increase adhesion area.

howWeCalculate.intro: This 3d print bed adhesion calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
